title: Aptitude
subtitle: Event Management & Ticketing Platform
summary: Full-stack event management and ticketing platform built to support event publishing, online ticket sales, attendee registration, and administrative operations.
overview: Aptitude is a custom event management and ticketing platform designed for an entertainment business. The system brings event publishing, ticket purchasing workflows, attendee information, and administrative tools into a single platform while supporting payment and analytics integrations.
problem: The business needed a dedicated platform for managing events and online ticketing instead of relying entirely on disconnected third-party tools and manual administrative workflows.
role: Full Stack Web Developer responsible for translating business requirements into the frontend experience, backend APIs, ticketing workflows, payment integrations, and supporting administrative tools.
solution: Designed and developed a Nuxt.js frontend backed by Django REST Framework and PostgreSQL. The platform supports event management, ticket purchasing workflows, administrative operations, and Stripe and PayMongo integrations.
features: Online ticket selection and purchasing workflows
Administrative dashboards for event and order operations

technicalDecisions.reason: Used to structure event, ticket, and order data behind reusable RESTful API endpoints.
Used to build a responsive event and ticket purchasing experience with reusable Vue components.
Integrated payment services to support the platform's online checkout workflows.

challenges: Designing a ticket purchasing and payment flow that connected the customer-facing experience, backend order records, third-party payment services, and analytics tracking without losing transaction context.
outcomes: Delivered a custom event and ticketing platform that centralized event publishing, online ticket purchasing, administrative workflows, and payment integrations
